lines.text: ...Let's stop it here, {PlayerName}. The victory is yours.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Heh, this is the first time I've faced an opponent worthy of bringing my all to an Echo duel since I left the New Federation...
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: No... The games there are not for pleasure. Losing there costs more than just your honor or reputation. It's about... paying a much heavier price.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Indeed. Honestly, it's just a way for the stronger, more ruthless ones to eliminate the ones they despise.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: After founding the Ghost Hounds, I made sure to forbid such cruel displays.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: I feared if we followed that path, we'd lose our humanity, dragged into a darkness where there's no turning back.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Still, being able to play it like a game, without those burdens... it's a refreshing experience.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Heh. Just some old memories surfacing. Thank you for listening, {PlayerName}.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Now then, congratulations on your final victory.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: I must be going. May the darkness never reach your eyes, {PlayerName}.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige
